conversations.title: Filtering threshold policy
conversations.snippet: Tune CJK and ASCII narrative minimums.

conversations.title: Display consistency pass
conversations.snippet: Apply the same filter on read and write paths.

highlights: Fragment rejection became a hard filter so weekly narrative sections can no longer pass single-token artifacts.
Read-path and write-path filtering now share one consistency policy to prevent old data from polluting the UI.
recurring_questions: How strict should the narrative threshold be so that we remove noise without deleting meaningful short technical terms?
unresolved_threads: A finer taxonomy may still be needed to distinguish legitimate short terminology from true low-signal stubs.
suggested_focus: Add fragment rejection cases to CI so threshold changes cannot regress silently.

evidence.note: Reviewed screenshots and examples of fragment regressions.
Defined threshold boundaries and over-filtering risks.
